name: Amatriciana Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Plum tomatoes, in juice (total 35 ounces)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions: Heat oil in a medium-sized heavy saucepan over medium-high heat. Add the onions and sauté for 10 minutes. Stir in the bacon and garlic, and sauté for an additional 5 minutes. Stir in the tomatoes, sugar, and wine. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Simmer, uncovered, for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
